/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAIT TO ADD COUNT #3, PC 29805(A)(1), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: #3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X: THE FIREARM DESCRIPTIONWAS AMENDED AS TO COUNT 1 TO BE A ,22 CALIBER RIFFLE/NTW60/LDPX:10-29-21/987,2/OR/WS/X: NO WEAPONS OF ANY KIND/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PHC/X:ORAL REQUEST BY DEFENSE TO MODIFY ELECTRONIC MONITORING DENIED//CONTD: 10-04-21 FOR PHC AND 10-12-21 FOR PRELIM HEARING (EST 1 HOUR)/DOP/
